_comment: Machine-readable project governance rules. Read by hooks + GitHub Actions workflows. Do NOT edit without going through codex:adversarial-review + PR + CODEOWNERS approval (this file is itself trust-boundary).

evidence_required_per_stage.TDD: test file sha + test run output sha

skill_gate_policy.enforcement_description: Since gov-bootstrap-hardening-2 (2026-04-19), a missing first-line Skill gate does NOT block the response. stop-response-check.sh appends a drift record to .claude/state/skill-gate-drift.jsonl (inferred_skill from transcript scan, first_line, response_sha, time_utc), emits stderr WARN, and exits 0. Rationale: block-mode produced 29 violations per multi-hour session without improving compliance; drift-log preserves audit trail + enables rollup without interruption. Out-of-whitelist exempt reason still blocks (invariant).

degradation_policy.allowed_downgrade: execution downgrade (subagent-to-manual; parallel-to-serial); first-line gate drift-log inference from transcript
degradation_policy.forbidden: skipping any skill pipeline stage (TDD to impl to review to verification); using an out-of-whitelist exempt reason

skill_gate_policy.wrong_skill_remediation: acknowledge + restart from correct skill; user inquiry = trigger
skill_gate_policy.future_hardening_3_scope: auto-inject mode (gate injection + validation pipeline) + CI rollup report of skill-gate-drift.jsonl

verification_template.audience: user themselves (non-coder; voice input; needs term translation + actionable steps)
verification_template.language: Chinese for user-facing; English for JSON keys
required_sections: action: reproducible UI/command/button level operation steps
expected: observable UI state / file changes / command output
evidence_requirements: critical steps must include screenshot or command output transcript
pass criteria must be binary decidable

delivery_medium.acceptance_evidence_upload: PR comment with screenshot / command output

adversarial_review_loop.round_definition: 1 round = 1 Codex half-round + 1 Claude half-round (round trip = 1 round)
adversarial_review_loop.on_converge_within_3: auto-proceed to next stage, no user interruption
adversarial_review_loop.on_non_convergence: escalate to user; payload includes verdict sequence + unresolved findings + Claude rationale + tradeoff positions + bypass options with cost
applies_to_artifacts: feature PR code (via GitHub Actions workflow)
adversarial_review_loop.rescue_purpose: diagnosis / Q&A / auxiliary reasoning only; NOT a review channel

per_round_artifact.review_target_sha: required (= spec blob sha at review time)

execution_venue_by_stage.pr_feature_code: GitHub Actions runner (unforgeable second-layer backstop; reviews spec/plan files too)

phase_delivery.exemption_mechanism: plan file frontmatter may set phase_delivery: false + exemption_reason; exemption itself goes through Codex review
phase_delivery.acceptance_evidence: user self-runs steps + screenshot/output + PR comment
phase_delivery.plan_0a_classification: governance/infrastructure plan → phase_delivery: true, acceptance = mechanism verification rather than business feature
phase_delivery.business_plan_examples: K-line rendering, RSI indicator, etc. business module plans → phase_delivery: true, acceptance = UI/feature verification

hat_signoff_verification.author: non-bot GitHub user (repo owner, not claude-code / any bot)
hat_signoff_verification.timing: comment posted AFTER latest PR commit AND AFTER required checks pass
hat_signoff_verification.staleness: new push -> signoff invalidated, must re-sign
hat_signoff_verification.format: exact hat string match (not substring; not PR body text; not template placeholder)

user_escalation_ladder.admin_bypass_definition: GitHub audit-log admin action + required check conclusion remains failure/neutral (NOT success)
forbidden_bypass_paths: Claude-authored PR body as bypass record
setting check-run conclusion to success when verdict is not approve

bootstrap_lock.write_permission: GitHub Actions workflow only (Claude Edit denied except during bootstrap PR itself)
